title: UnifiedModel
description: Unified schema for both local and cloud AI models managed by slab-server.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name of the model.

status.description: Current status of the model. Cloud models default to 'ready'. Local models start as 'not_downloaded'.

endpoint.description: API endpoint for cloud models, e.g. 'https://api.openai.com/v1'.

pricing.description: Optional pricing info for cost tracking.

input.description: Cost per 1K input tokens in USD.

output.description: Cost per 1K output tokens in USD.

repo_id.description: HuggingFace repo ID for local models, e.g. 'bartowski/Llama-3-8B-Instruct-GGUF'.

filename.description: Model filename within the HuggingFace repo, e.g. 'Llama-3-8B-Instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf'.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the downloaded model file on disk (populated after download).

context_window.description: Maximum context window size in tokens.

runtime_presets.description: Default runtime parameters applied when this model is used for inference.
